DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; DOCUMENT REQUESTS FROM DEPOSITION NOTICE OF CORY NAROG IS GRANTED AS FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE TO THE WRITTEN DISCOVERY VERIFYING THAT ALL RESPONSES ARE FULL AND COMPLETE AND ALL PRODUCTION HAS BEEN MADE TO THE REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION AS OF THE TIME OF THE VERIFICATION. DEFENDANT MAY PROCEED WITH FURTHER DEPOSITION AS TO DOCUMENTS PRODUCED AFTER THE COMPLETION OF THE PREVIOUS SESSION OF PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION. THE VERIFICATIONS SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FURTHER DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF MAY BE NOTICED AND COMPLETED WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SACK, SAUL J.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To 1)Df'S Request For Production Of Document, Set 1: 2)Df'S Form Interrogatories, Set 1; 3) Special Interrogatories, Set 1; 4) Document Requests From Deposition Notice Of Cory Narog; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One; Defendant's Special Interrogatories, Set One; Document Requests From Deposition Notice Of Cory Narog is granted as further responses shall be made to the written discovery verifying that all responses are full and complete and all production has been made to the Request For Production as of the time of the verification. Defendant may proceed with further deposition as to documents produced after the completion of the previous session of Plaintiff's deposition. The verifications shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order. Further deposition of Plaintiff may be noticed and completed within 20 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
